Windows.name: Windows
Windows.requirements: Windows 10 (version 1607) or newer (Intel or AMD processors only)
Windows.items_added:
(Library) Audio codec filter is now available on music libraries when browsing tracks (PM-5224)
(Network) IPv6 support has TEMPORARILY been made a plex pass feature (PM-5140)
(Network) Support for ipv6 only networks (PM-5140)
(Subtitles) Added support for dvb_teletext (PM-3855)
(Transcoder) The "HEVC Sources Only" encoding setting now also applies to AV1 sources and is named "HEVC/AV1 Sources Only" (PM-5261)
Updated Web to 4.160.0
Windows.items_fixed:
(Downloads) Stream display titles in download decisions now match streaming decisions (PM-5211)
(Library) Expose HDR, DOVI, and Atmos filters for episodes in show libraries (PM-5215)
(Library) Manual API requests could allow invalid URIs for smart collections and playlists (PM-4267)
(Live-TV) OTA channels would often fail to hardware transcode on MacOS (PM-4103)
(MacOS) The server could crash under certain network conditions (PM-5421)
(Metadata) Don't abort metadata refresh on failed match if remaining providers are all local (PM-5422)
(Metadata) Local album images can fail to load if item matching is incomplete (PM-5422)
(Metadata) Prefer certification tag when reading NFO content ratings and match to library country preference (PM-5378)
(Metadata) Read writers credits in NFO parser (PM-5377)
(Metadata) Using multiple providers with ratings can result in primary rating being set inconsistently (PM-5458)
(Metadata) When remote providers are missing local metadata would fail to load (PM-5488)
(Performance) Speed up related collection queries in some scenarios (PM-5204)
(PlexMatch) Using show guid hints in .plexmatch files can result in unmatched episodes on initial scan (PM-5184)
(Scanner) Filename text in curly braces should get cleaned up on unmatched content (PM-4844)
(Transcoder) Correct the Content-Type of DASH manifest files (PM-5259)

(Metadata) Prefer certification tag when reading NFO content ratings and match to library country preference (PM-5378)
(Metadata) Read writers credits in NFO parser (PM-5377)
(Metadata) Using multiple providers with ratings can result in primary rating being set inconsistently (PM-5458)
(Metadata) When remote providers are missing local metadata would fail to load (PM-5488)
(Performance) Speed up related collection queries in some scenarios (PM-5204)
(PlexMatch) Using show guid hints in .plexmatch files can result in unmatched episodes on initial scan (PM-5184)
(Scanner) Filename text in curly braces should get cleaned up on unmatched content (PM-4844)
(Transcoder) Correct the Content-Type of DASH manifest files (PM-5259)

Western Digital (OS 5).name: Western Digital (OS 5)
Western Digital (OS 5).requirements: Note: Requires My Cloud OS 5. Older devices use 'Western Digital (OS3)'.
Western Digital (OS 5).items_added:
(Library) Audio codec filter is now available on music libraries when browsing tracks (PM-5224)
(Network) IPv6 support has TEMPORARILY been made a plex pass feature (PM-5140)
(Network) Support for ipv6 only networks (PM-5140)
(Subtitles) Added support for dvb_teletext (PM-3855)
(Transcoder) The "HEVC Sources Only" encoding setting now also applies to AV1 sources and is named "HEVC/AV1 Sources Only" (PM-5261)
Updated Web to 4.160.0
Western Digital (OS 5).items_fixed:
(Downloads) Stream display titles in download decisions now match streaming decisions (PM-5211)
(Library) Expose HDR, DOVI, and Atmos filters for episodes in show libraries (PM-5215)
(Library) Manual API requests could allow invalid URIs for smart collections and playlists (PM-4267)
(Live-TV) OTA channels would often fail to hardware transcode on MacOS (PM-4103)
(MacOS) The server could crash under certain network conditions (PM-5421)
(Metadata) Don't abort metadata refresh on failed match if remaining providers are all local (PM-5422)
(Metadata) Local album images can fail to load if item matching is incomplete (PM-5422)
(Metadata) Prefer certification tag when reading NFO content ratings and match to library country preference (PM-5378)
(Metadata) Read writers credits in NFO parser (PM-5377)
(Metadata) Using multiple providers with ratings can result in primary rating being set inconsistently (PM-5458)
(Metadata) When remote providers are missing local metadata would fail to load (PM-5488)
(Performance) Speed up related collection queries in some scenarios (PM-5204)
(PlexMatch) Using show guid hints in .plexmatch files can result in unmatched episodes on initial scan (PM-5184)
(Scanner) Filename text in curly braces should get cleaned up on unmatched content (PM-4844)
(Transcoder) Correct the Content-Type of DASH manifest files (PM-5259)
